requirement_topic.en: DEWA DRRG Grid Connection, Anti-Islanding, and Utility-Interface Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: DEWA DRRG 并网、防孤岛及并网接口证据
requirement_topic.zht: DEWA DRRG 併網、防孤島及併網介面證據

summary.en: DEWA Shams Dubai relies on DRRG standards, connection conditions, connection guidelines, inspection and testing requirements, and eligible equipment lists for distributed renewable resource generators. For PV inverters, DEWA minimum eligibility points to the DRRG Standards Version 3.0, December 2023, including inverter compliance tests for low-voltage and/or medium-voltage connected RRGPs. Anti-islanding and utility-interface evidence should be prepared in the DEWA DRRG context rather than treated as a generic China grid certificate.
summary.zh: DEWA Shams Dubai 针对分布式可再生能源发电设备使用 DRRG 标准、接入条件、接入指南、检查测试要求和合格设备清单。对于光伏逆变器，DEWA 最低资格指向 2023 年 12 月第 3.0 版 DRRG 标准，包括低压和/或中压接入 RRGP 的逆变器合规测试。防孤岛和并网接口证据应放在 DEWA DRRG 语境下准备，而不是作为通用中国并网证书处理。
summary.zht: DEWA Shams Dubai 針對分散式可再生能源發電設備使用 DRRG 標準、接入條件、接入指南、檢查測試要求和合格設備清單。對於光伏逆變器，DEWA 最低資格指向 2023 年 12 月第 3.0 版 DRRG 標準，包括低壓和／或中壓接入 RRGP 的逆變器合規測試。防孤島和併網介面證據應放在 DEWA DRRG 語境下準備，而不是作為通用中國併網證書處理。

standards_or_laws: DEWA DRRG Connection Guidelines - Version 2.1 - March 2024
DEWA DRRG Inspection and Testing Guidelines - Version 2.0 - April 2020
IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 as common anti-islanding and utility-interface evidence where requested by project or utility review

summary.en: China grid evidence commonly references GB/T 19964, GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, utility test reports, and domestic anti-islanding settings. These can support a technical delta review but do not replace DEWA DRRG equipment enrollment, project connection conditions, inspection, or commissioning files.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常引用 GB/T 19964、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、电网公司测试报告和国内防孤岛参数。这些资料可支持技术差异审查，但不能替代 DEWA DRRG 设备登记、项目接入条件、检查或投运文件。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常引用 GB/T 19964、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、電網公司測試報告和國內防孤島參數。這些資料可支持技術差異審查，但不能替代 DEWA DRRG 設備登記、項目接入條件、檢查或投運文件。

gap.en: The gap is project and utility acceptance: the inverter evidence must be aligned with the relevant DEWA appendix, low-voltage or medium-voltage connection category, protection settings, reconnection behavior, harmonic evidence, and commissioning sequence.
gap.zh: 差距在项目和电力公司接受：逆变器证据必须与相关 DEWA 附录、低压或中压接入类别、保护参数、重连行为、谐波证据和投运流程一致。
gap.zht: 差距在項目和電力公司接受：逆變器證據必須與相關 DEWA 附錄、低壓或中壓接入類別、保護參數、重連行為、諧波證據和投運流程一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for DEWA-connected distributed renewable resource projects in Dubai where Shams Dubai / DRRG requirements apply; outside Dubai, the relevant emirate utility route must be confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-code evidence is not transferable as UAE utility approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat DEWA DRRG review as a separate utility gate. IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 and China GB/T grid files are useful only when mapped to the DEWA connection category and project file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 DEWA DRRG 审查视为独立电力公司门槛。IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 和中国 GB/T 并网文件只有在映射至 DEWA 接入类别和项目文件后才有用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 DEWA DRRG 審查視為獨立電力公司門檻。IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 和中國 GB/T 併網文件只有在映射至 DEWA 接入類別和項目文件後才有用。
